title: Ember Tea
description: At the start of the next [blue]5[/blue] combats, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic grants +2 Strength at the start of each combat for 5 combats. After 5 combats, the relic becomes disabled and no longer activates.
